name: Jacky Rosen
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hi there,

Because of grassroots support from Team Rosen, we were able to blow past our FEC end-of-quarter goal last month - and your support could not have come at a more important time. **Thank you!**

**We 're in a fight for nothing less than the future of our country**: from the future of the Supreme Court, to women's reproductive freedom, protecting our health care, defending Dreamers, and more. I'm honored to have you by my side as we work to make America a country that works for everyone - not just the wealthy few.

But the polls are neck-and-neck, and our Senate race is an uphill climb - especially with GOP Super PACs and national Republicans already pouring millions into Nevada to defeat me. **All of your support goes directly to getting our message out to hardworking Nevadans, and to repealing and replacing Dean Heller in November.**

We couldn't do this without you.

Thanks again,

Jacky

[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd681/4fbb2af3/7ddac145/5e8bdfb5/3511502354/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgwNC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk804-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd681/4fbb2af3/7ddac145/5e8bdfb2/3511502354/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd681/4fbb2af3/7ddac145/5e8bdfb3/3511502354/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd681/4fbb2af3/7ddac145/5e8bdfb0/3511502354/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: It's time to bring fiscal responsibility back to Tallahassee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-JS-Fagd-HRx1GgMZqFnDpS289dKvMjMOefh9rVKF0=/zaYf7zKWOqL7AybgPefTJvfIbdfKNxib9b3rsWjsRyY=) Friends and Neighbors -- The descent of Hurricane Irma last summer was catastrophic and even devastating to many homes, businesses and livelihoods across our state. The process of debris removal and other recovery efforts was essential to our communities being able to recover from this monster storm. So I was quite disappointed and disgusted to **[read a new report in the _Miami Herald_](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-JS-Fagd-HRx1GgMZqFnDpS289dKvMjMOefh9rVKF0=/3OwHnd-olSlRjgWZhch2JaVH1_x7AkJAyKJqpqdv4T8=)** , detailing Governor Scott's wasteful and fiscally irresponsible decisions regarding post-Irma debris removal deals. One of the companies selected did not even have previous emergency debris removal experience, while others who did were blocked from even submitting bids. **This lapse in judgement will end up costing us tax payers an additional $28 or even $30 million dollars.** Even more disturbing is that this kind of wasteful spending from the Governor was not flagged and called into question by our current Chief Financial Officer (CFO), who should have audited this process. [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-JS-Fagd-HRx1GgMZqFnDpS289dKvMjMOefh9rVKF0=/hIuCXJbsfSqthIvezIQsS7o_gsBL9HKLn9ixm5s_lxA=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) But when there are no checks and balances in the cabinet - and in the office of the CFO - cronyism and ineptitude will run amok - **and your hard earned tax payer dollars will be recklessly and irresponsibly wasted.** This is exactly the kind of thing that got me into this race. As your next CFO, **I would be the check and balance that CFO Patronis has failed to be, making sure that your state government spends _YOUR_ money wisely and transparently.** But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help****.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help me bring checks and balances back to the Cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-JS-Fagd-HRx1GgMZqFnDpS289dKvMjMOefh9rVKF0=/hIuCXJbsfSqthIvezIQsS7o_gsBL9HKLn9ixm5s_lxA=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: The White House
subject: The real stories of those who protect our borders
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba7a8ee27846002aa01df4986f6800293d738883f4be77047f026eb0188ac63e2c1b164b6596587c57c5e101652203bf2d0

The White House - July 3, 2018

The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump will deliver remarks at a Salute for Service Dinner to celebrate our Nation's Military in White Sulphur Springs, WV.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba7020cc337113ddf3318265fe5fb8bcbd8131bdb726b08e199cf76717fbfbd627f50bb9d9c13c6b6a5d4ae659defc17d42
Watch live at 6:40 p.m. ET.

The real stories of those who protect our borders

Protecting our country is what we ask our law enforcement community to do each and every day for their fellow Americans. The
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba7e875c86948cbd139f7d1180a1ccad8b47959bd37b89d2c17e0f837ec94b095657e661f7014f8d74826ed6f1954ffeab9
Department of Homeland Security reminds us that the brave men and women of U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) are no different. These selfless Americans put themselves in harm's way each time they go to work to look out for their neighbors and their country.

Their stories are remarkable, though you likely wouldn't know it from watching the nightly news. In the past few weeks alone, agents have
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba72a0904287a71e5778e097b1c5ac8832958e28fa0b85b124c6ee953dd7b23f5350c56021b6c6c6e5b5d01c5f5220b2c5c
rescued a 6-year-old Costa Rican child abandoned in 100-degree heat by a smuggler,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba7eceb72d4ed3c02a78f4a7d68b3f23611e86fd8bc48a208dab04c3bcd8e7aed676a386bc48f5ef6aaf0a9bc4c0b66ec04
seized a cache of assault weapons that included 962 rounds of ammunition, and intercepted more than
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba775e89a5708e9fcd75c438ed73df0676ba9d7e1c40ae6cbb14c54929add99072afb270fc06cdd189ccfda5fc7fd358b74
$4.2 million worth of alleged crystal methamphetamine .

These agents do difficult, dangerous work that affects Americans' lives far beyond our border—they keep communities across the country safe from drugs, violence, and the consequences of human trafficking. They deserve our gratitude, not calls for the elimination of their agencies, as more and more prominent Democrats are beginning to do.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba709638d19a4d9fe94fcd3bf48f73e209b3c12a1b19d4642eb738a11b92bde54e2cbb5647463ebc17e4e623003ccf0f282
Read how ICE agents arrested 32 convicted sexual predators on Long Island.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba7fa9c177da9801e83e138eb7e6be8a2d76a781fbc0cc8bd36eacf2bcc356c07b0de4f8b6a1061b5b7b2ea96ac2742942e
Inside First Lady Melania Trump's visit to CPB facilities in Arizona.

A 400-year-old relationship

President Trump welcomed Prime Minister Mark Rutte of the Netherlands to the White House yesterday for bilateral talks on trade, investment, and security. "The relationship between the Netherlands and the United States is over 400 years old," Prime Minister Rutte said. "We are allies. We have always been friends."

When it comes to trade, President Trump made it clear that the key word is fair. "We are very close to making some very good trade deals—fair trade deals. I didn't want to say 'good'; I wanted to say 'fair'—fair trade deals for our taxpayers and for our workers and our farmers."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba7da4fc127cca3173a066a87108f2b2f118d4c4fe3abbf60f11661c4862f8b38f757fa28c8ddfda518b42d2d482dc51c87
Watch President Trump welcome Prime Minister Rutte in the Oval Office.

Photo of the Day

Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks

First Lady Melania Trump visits a classroom at the Upbring New Hope Children's Shelter in McAllen, Texas
| June 21, 2018

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=880b98c36a566ba70ae73b17eef81c53faf665dd3b3860d4c6a1db11f84b65997d4aa08c6013d5d70d555179decc9fa415aa4ab2208fd9c4
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f077e98665090a6534ec1228ad95ce44eb645509708a94d280568e72aaff7d68065c281172b7aef891c1c5868f75864cbefe3b47f2c6177
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4925efe095db48d0d755fa14885a173926cb9ffc931238c65f62897cd4fb6f38e0f47fdfc86115428181ab45a7bcdefa6b296bc5bc8e9ec90

body:
There is _nothing_ more important for Democrats this year than taking back the Senate majority - and the only way we can do that is by winning here in Nevada.
**But team, we just received the news that Jacky is basically tied with Dean Heller. If Jacky wins, Nevada wins.**
A Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC is promising to spend at least $11.2 million to help Republicans keep this seat - and the Senate majority. The future of our country is riding on you.
If Jacky loses this fall, Senate Republicans will have free rein to defund Planned Parenthood, attack Americans' health care and send more anti-everything ultraconservatives to the Supreme Court.
**We can't let this happen. That's why I told Jacky I'd help her raise the $10,000 she needs by midnight to keep Nevada blue and take back the United States Senate for Democrats.**
**[But with just hours to go, we're still falling short, so I need to ask: Please, can you give $5 by midnight for a better Nevada?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd687/4fbb2af3/7dd6c961/5e8bdffe/1466021405/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgxNi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk816-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: AT RISK: coverage for pre-existing conditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

The Administration recently told a federal court in Texas that it would not defend a crucial piece of the Affordable Care Act -- putting health coverage for Americans with pre-existing conditions at risk.

If their argument is accepted by the federal courts it could lead to insurers being able to deny coverage to those with pre-existing conditions again.

This is wrong, and I'm fighting it.

Millions of Americans rely on these protections for their health care, and we can't put their access to coverage in jeopardy.

**We beat the Administration 's attempts to gut the Affordable Care Act before, and now we need to do it again. **[**Will you add your name to support protecting coverage for people with pre-existing conditions?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Oo%2BJz40HvjEWF1se59kQjqEgj1l9pZcY)

Thanks,

name: Ben Jealous
subject: "What, to an American Slave, is your Fourth of July?"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a689/7ab0e2c4/7fea1bb1/349b97bf/2467646756/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight-2?refcode=OHQ07038A") Friend, "To him, your celebration is a sham; ... your shouts of liberty and equality, hollow mockery...." In 1852, Frederick Douglass spoke these words to express the sentiments of the American Slave to an audience observing Independence Day. With so many in bondage today -- from families separated in immigration detention, to the epidemic of mass incarceration -- we can't forget these words. I know I never have. Throughout my career as a civil rights leader and community organizer, I've often thought of Douglass and tried to mirror his example. Essentially, at his core, Douglass was an organizer and a believer in building big, broad coalitions for change. I was fortunate enough to be named Marylander of the Year in 2013 because as president and CEO of the NAACP, I helped lead a historic effort to abolish the death penalty, achieve marriage equality, and pass the Maryland DREAM Act all in one year. When skeptics doubted if immigrants, LGBTQ+, and civil rights groups could all come together and advance at once, I thought of Douglass' courage and worked to help fashion the type of coalition he described as, "the perfect national illustration of the unity and dignity of the human family that the world has ever seen." His refusal to see opportunity and justice as a zero-sum game gives us a road map for every struggle for equality since. When we act as if only one group has the ability to gain power, or that the success of an oppressed group comes at the price of another, we allow ourselves to be pitted against those who would ally with us to ensure justice for all. 166 years ago, Douglass simply asked: "What, to an American Slave, is your Fourth of July?" Today we celebrate freedom and all that America has accomplished in extending liberty and equality, but we cannot forget those who are still striving for it right here at home. What, to those still in bondage, is Independence Day? For them, for each other, and for Maryland, we must keep fighting. May we all continue to strive for the independence the Fourth of July honors. Onward. Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a689/7ab0e2c4/7fea1bb1/349b97bf/2467646756/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight-2?refcode=OHQ07038A")

| **REMINDER: Join Governor Scott for Independence Day Celebrations** As we celebrate the anniversary of our nation's independence, we hope you’ll be able to join the Governor and Team Scott in parades this week across the state! Don’t forget to bring your green Phil Scott t-shirt! If you don’t have one, we’ll have extras.

_**Tonight! July 3rd**_

**Montpelier**
Line-up: 5:00 PM on Summer Street
Parade will begin at 6:00 PM
Fireworks to follow!

_**July 4th**_

**Colchester**
Line-up: 10:00 AM at Colchester High School
Parade will begin at 11:00 AM

**Stowe**
Line-up: 11:30 on Weeks Hill Road
Parade will begin at 12:45

_**Saturday, July 7th**_

**Brandon**
Line-up: 12:00 PM at Park Village, west of Rte. 7 off of Arnold District Rd.
Parade will begin at 1:00 PM

Please don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions, and we hope to see you soon!

Have a safe and happy Independence Day!

Jason Maulucci

subject: This is not ok

body:
Team:

The Trump administration is doing the unthinkable -- again.

President Trump and his allies are sabotaging the Affordable Care Act, attempting to end protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions. They are undermining one of the most popular provisions of the ACA and putting millions of Americans' health care at risk as a result.

**We can't let that happen.**

Insurance companies should not be allowed to turn away cancer survivors, pregnant women, diabetics, or people with any number of other conditions. While there is always work to be done to bring health care costs down, making discrimination against people with pre-existing conditions illegal has changed the lives of so many people -- in every corner of Pennsylvania and across the nation. The Trump administration is sabotaging affordable health care, and millions of Americans will pay the price if we don't stop them.

**_[Tell the Trump administration that you won't let them destroy one of the core provisions of the Affordable Care Act.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61fd/51dbcc2a/1bb22068/3a726fd/2332408662/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=casey&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&fname=&lname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")_** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61fd/51dbcc2a/1bb22068/3a726fd/2332408662/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=casey&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&fname=&lname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326") We won't let them reverse this progress without a fight. clean_body: Team: The Trump administration is doing the unthinkable -- again. President Trump and his allies are sabotaging the Affordable Care Act, attempting to end protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions. They are undermining one of the most popular provisions of the ACA and putting millions of Americans' health care at risk as a result. We can't let that happen. Insurance companies should not be allowed to turn away cancer survivors, pregnant women, diabetics, or people with any number of other conditions. While there is always work to be done to bring health care costs down, making discrimination against people with pre-existing conditions illegal has changed the lives of so many people -- in every corner of Pennsylvania and across the nation. The Trump administration is sabotaging affordable health care, and millions of Americans will pay the price if we don't stop them. "" "" We won't let them reverse this progress without a fight. name: Ben Cohen
subject: The Stamp Stampede is back!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
This July 4th I want to celebrate a different kind of independence - our independence from big money in politics.
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa75/bed43eb/65895642/75fd3cab/1477979205/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stamp-out?refcode=em180703&noskip=true")
Friends,
This July 4th I want to celebrate a different kind of independence - our independence from big money in politics.
You, friends, can celebrate the holiday by rubber stamping your bills with messages like **" Stamp Money Out of Politics"** and **" Not to be Used to Bribe Politicians"** to make sure we get big money out of politics. Together, we can put this powerful message in front of millions.
[**Now, let's get stamping! Donate $25 or more to Our Revolution and you'll receive this FREE Stamp Money Out of Politics self-inking rubber stamp.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa75/bed43eb/65895642/75fd3cab/1477979205/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stamp-out?refcode=em180703&noskip=true")
I started the Stamp Stampede to demonstrate the power of people over dollars. We've had so much success since last year that I want to challenge all of us to really step it up in 2018. Think about it like this: Just one person stamping 3 bills a day for a year creates a million impressions. You can't buy that type of advertising!
With over 100,000 people like us rubber-stamping bills that will be seen an average of 875 times per bill, more than 8,400,000,000 people will be reached with our message of getting big money out of politics! Holy cow.
[**This Independence Day is about we, the people, fighting for our independence from big money in politics. Can we count you in?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa75/bed43eb/65895642/75fd3cab/1477979205/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stamp-out?refcode=em180703&noskip=true")
In solidarity,
Ben Cohen
Co-founder of Ben & Jerry's Ice Cream
Head Stamper at StampStampede.org
**[JOIN THE STAMP STAMPEDE »](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa75/bed43eb/65895642/75fd3cab/1477979205/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stamp-out?refcode=em180703&noskip=true")**
PS - Remember how they taught us that taxation without representation is tyranny? Well, so is big money in politics! Celebrate Independence Day by stamping big money out of politics. **Don't worry, this is 100% legal! Check out the stamp you 'll get when you pitch in here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stamp-out](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa75/bed43eb/65895642/75fd3cab/1477979205/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stamp-out?refcode=em180703&noskip=true")**

There couldn't be more riding on Florida's Senate race than this. Rick Scott and his self-serving, destructive views are bad enough -- **but now Scott has the chance to go to Washington, D.C., and vote to confirm Trump 's Supreme Court nominee.**

We have to keep Rick Scott out of the Senate. The entire Republican party sees Justice Kennedy's retirement as their chance to **overturn Roe v. Wade, roll back voting rights, and end marriage equality.**

Defending Senator Nelson's seat could be the final line of defense for defending these rights, not to mention countless other progressive priorities.

[**We need 10,000 supporters to sign on and pledge their support for Senator Nelson before Trump announces his nominee. Our voices must be heard: Senator Nelson must stay in the Senate. body:
Team -
Imagine what it would mean if we lose this race in Nevada and the GOP keeps control of the Senate.
They could rip health care from millions. They could keep ignoring climate change, putting the future of our planet in danger. And they could confirm more extremist Supreme Court nominees who won't protect women's reproductive rights.
We deserve better than that, team - but _The Washington Post_ reports that Democrats likely CANNOT take back the Senate if we lose this race, so the future of our country could depend on what happens here in Nevada.
**It 's impossible to overstate the stakes of this election. But here's what we know: We NEED to raise another $10,000 by midnight to stay on track to beat the GOP's candidate.**

Thank you so much.
Jacky

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Georgia can - and should - do more to serve those who have served our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Georgia can - and should - do more to serve those who have served our country. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaafc/34a064cc/b1ed2e1/70f6bc0/2837172968/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, Georgia is home to more than 700,000 veterans and an even larger community of active-duty and reserve members, civilian military employees, and military families. These brave Georgians have made tremendous sacrifices for our state and our nation. **It is our responsibility, in turn, to make sure that Georgia supports them:** **[Sign my petition if you agree that Georgia should do more for those who have served our country.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaafc/34a064cc/b1ed2e1/70f6bc1/2837172968/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzAzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/support-veterans?source=IE070318-full")** Here is some of what I am proposing: 1\. Education \- We can help veterans who are pursuing an education by hiring support staff at every college and university, offering more credit transfer options, and creating stronger financial supports. 2\. Jobs \- We will pass incentives to encourage companies to hire veterans and invest in industries that will create jobs in rural Georgia, where a high percentage of our veterans live. 3\. Mental Health \- Georgia must expand Medicaid to increase access to mental health and substance abuse treatment. We also must reach out to veterans who are eligible for but not using existing Veterans Affairs programs. As House Democratic Leader, I helped pass bipartisan measures to support those who have served our country - but there is so much more that Georgia can do to help. **[Stand with me if you agree: Our veterans, military families, and service members deserve the freedom and opportunity to thrive.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaafc/34a064cc/b1ed2e1/70f6bc1/2837172968/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzAzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/support-veterans?source=IE070318-full")** Thank you, Stacey Abrams

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: No Attorney General should take money from corporations she is charged with overseeing and investigating and whose lawbreaking she may prosecute.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I will not take a cent of corporate money -- not corporate PACs, not LLCs.
#

Peter -
From the start of this race, I've said that I will not take a cent of corporate money -- not corporate PACs, not LLCs.
Well yesterday, all of our opponents without hesitation confirmed that they are going to take corporate money.
This is not complicated: No Attorney General should take money from corporations she is charged with overseeing and investigating and whose lawbreaking she may prosecute.
The line in the sand is drawn and the stakes are clear: This race is about the grassroots vs. corporate money and the political establishment. So I have to ask:
**[Peter, can you chip in $3 today to help us fight back against big money? We don't have to outraise them, but we cannot fall too far behind. With your donation and our grassroots energy, we're going to win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e46/6e822e2f/1b0b76d7/41726448/2461039906/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-grassroots?refcode=em180703-full")**
Our economy and political system are stacked against working Americans. The wealthy rig the system and then use their money to buy elections. And when candidates take corporate money, they become complicit in that system.
We are going to run this campaign differently. And if you're with me, we're going to win.
Thank you,
Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e46/6e822e2f/1b0b76d7/41726448/2461039906/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-grassroots?refcode=em180703-full")**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
This week we celebrate Independence Day, and honor the sacrifices that Americans have made to keep our country the strongest in the world. From Alderson to Ripley to Wellsburg to New Haven to Morgantown to Shepherdstown, Team Manchin will be all over West Virginia celebrating the birth of our great nation.

_ "This 4th of July is a reminder that we can't build our country up if we are too busy tearing each other down. When we all work together there is nothing we can't accomplish."_ -- Joe

**Veterans and Military Families for Manchin**

This week we launched "Veterans and Military Families for Manchin," a grassroots coalition of West Virginians supporting Manchin representing every branch of the U.S. Armed Forces.

West Virginia's only living Medal of Honor recipient, Hershel "Woody" Williams, will chair the group for the campaign and work to rally Veterans and their families to support Joe. Veterans and family members can sign up for the group here:**[JoeManchinWV.com/Vets ](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKe6UoarcXKZDqPS%2f%2frJ8NOCG6KACm2Gy%2bfj7q%2bAMNcrYPRKutExLPA383jt9nqKoVkJ5AR4AC8MPyW0dH%2b3mkUckfMy%2fwQqZrg%3d%3d)** Check out our latest I Know Joe **[video.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfFamAUPaYNTtZoboLemVjL3z%2bfKQcvjJS0b6fUy1YlSNujvKWLQg7dK3DQGFxN%2bxi8eYDBVnTIMg%3d) **Joe and our entire team are honored to have the support, trust and friendship of so many Veterans and their families.

**2,000 People And Counting**

The people of West Virginia are speaking out by signing the petition online at www.StopMorrisey.com. So far, we've had 2,000 people sign the petition to tell Morrisey to stop attacking West Virginians with pre-existing conditions. West Virginians are angry that Morrisey joined a federal lawsuit to allow insurance companies to deny coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. Just read the letter from Robert Edge in Bridgeport, WV **[published in the Exponent-Telegram](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON14Dvkkrs9VaHWlLkko8kgi0IpFlL0SbRPxRSCOA0B3xN44vZHnjZjgxBIri3u5rcHiHPnCZ2fw9d6Ir2UXIDNE3eWac88hYKphDlym%2fW9ES1ZNe9LYDGvoFfRmS0qSWfsCgMlHWyJs4Y8zP5VL7Sc7DoD5gUE9sbVHDatczWKKl18R5UBX7UgAG3tgU%2f4gX6liNZUo3%2fOQsLhGsFYqTJldOFPou7yTcDv),** or the letter from Whitney Wheeler in Morgantown, WV**[published in the Dominion Post.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC45VHwrT2BRgGP3IMBCOf%2bujU7yUfKKcfjR1OplK%2b7CJkguYpB3Ep9xQ2zq356shr9aGBKZTsqECqCZappO0PLTg0eB6K8mKMFmLLbrL9nNI8DhKJ6eeV9aRVsAJjESrLdxHYZJTtY83x2kDfUdK4eQ2poyE0h3gkYvZMFzTlQQl1kD3l%2fGrXOGI%3d)**

**New Poll Shows Joe Up 46% to 35%**

A new [poll](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC46zO8q5nDP2CY38ox6O20Zcc54aF2B9hYeCLxCzTF7yQ3XXEcnG%2fasjRSCtETfFBoYaAcSxWJdVwWaArvOiqhUzvBNDZTjhz6yLLLzatzS4PprRjruOkd5bDbG6tUdW%2bMo399g2446EyeuStCUGvmeR9WpjC0K8zFA%3d%3d) from Public Policy Polling, a leading national polling company, shows that Joe Manchin's lead is growing over Patrick Morrisey.

PPP found Joe Manchin leading Patrick Morrisey 46% to 35%.

This is now **[the fifth consecutive poll](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON1nrE8P441a634V1QhzY1y7Cvjq%2bkMng%2f7zHydfnB3Ac592vxjPDtjPAgZqvcQAtJY9k%2f%2b%2bpW8bXwJ%2bBk1rG1NqUEa8rN5Grdie2NKzLcsb8XpRx%2fQDWMlX6xv4q%2bs0wQzW0wkqW8gZgMKl2ANTzbH%2fuUnmwmXiqZ3%2f%2bqfLY%2frP%2f%2btMMS3y5yUamHSs%2fjdGocVhzskUNsbZ9gGLa1uWo7vIPRQ7QTvf3sY9ojgolNw8Z8%3d)** confirming that Manchin has a significant lead over Morrisey.

**Update From the Campaign Trail**

>From Davis to Point Pleasant, Team Manchin has been all over West Virginia in the past week.

See you soon on the country roads.

Happy Fourth of July,

Mara

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Peter,

It's a question I get a lot:

"What can I do between now and November 6th to help women win?"

My answer?

Help them win their primaries.

We helped our first round of candidates make it through their primaries in May and June. Now, we have another slate of women facing tough primary and run-off elections over the next three months.

I've taken a look at our supporter records to see where we all can pitch in, and here's what I have down for this email address:
**2018 Cycle Donor Status:** Not yet
**Suggested Action:[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win up and down the ballot this cycle.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c423d/24c69fd9/18b12097b/18833dbf/910611037/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180703_email_JulySupporterRecord?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donateif+consinConsGroup9225++again+else&utm_campaign=WQEFES05N_digital_email_20180703_JulySupRec_inact&source=WQEFES05N_digital_email_20180703_JulySupRec_inact")**
We already know that primaries can be a steep hill for women candidates to climb. Couple that with Republican donors investing millions to see our women defeated, and that hill can become a mountain.

But I've seen this community move mountains before -- like last month, when we helped 71 women successfully make it through their primaries in races for Congress, governors' seats, and state and local offices.

We need your support before it's too late.

**Donate $3 before this year's final primary elections so we can help more women win up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Your-Supporter-Record](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c423d/24c69fd9/18b12097b/18833db8/910611037/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180703_email_JulySupporterRecord?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgYourSupporterRec&utm_campaign=WQEFES05N_digital_email_20180703_JulySupRec_inact&source=WQEFES05N_digital_email_20180703_JulySupRec_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

_This is such an incredible team, friend._ Everything we accomplish in this campaign wouldn't be possible with you, our core supporters. And I was really reminded of that this weekend, when we sailed past our quarterly fundraising goal, even when it looked like we were going to fall short. Our success was all thanks to this campaign's grassroots strength. **Meeting our goal this weekend has immediate consequences in this race, friend, and I really appreciate your help leading up to the deadline.** We're entering the heart of summer with serious momentum, and we're on track to win in November. With your help, I'll keep fighting for Arizona families in Congress. We'll keep our government accountable. And we won't let the far-right take this seat. Thank you. Yours, Tom P.S. It's summer now, so we're really entering campaign season, which means it's critical that we keep up our fundraising (I was recently named the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, so we can't take anything for granted in this race). **[Please consider making a donation to start off our July fundraising efforts.](http://action.tomohalleran. **_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: BREAKING-Money Laundering and Corrupt Practices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=1)
---
Friend -- **THIS** is the corporation that Tina Smith trusts to take care of our Boundary waters! Earlier today, [NPR reported](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.npr.org%2F2018%2F07%2F03%2F625564923%2Fglencore-shares-dive-after-subpoena-from-justice-department&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=2) that Glencore, the Swiss financier behind the PolyMet sulfide mines, was subpoenaed by the US Justice Department over accusations of money laundering and other corrupt practices in their international mining projects. This is not the first time Glencore has been accused of [wide-ranging financial crimes](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theguardian.com%2Fnews%2F2017%2Fnov%2F05%2Fglencore-australian-arm-moved-billions-through-bermuda&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=3). Additionally, Glencore has a [track record](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.greenpeace.ch%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2016%2F06%2FGlencore.pdf&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=4) of leaving [environmental catastrophe](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theguardian.com%2Fenvironment%2F2011%2Fsep%2F07%2Fglencore-fatalities-environmental-fines-record&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=5) and economic disaster wherever it does business. The corporation [prefers to do business](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforeignpolicy.com%2F2012%2F04%2F23%2Fa-giant-among-giants%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=6) in countries under [international sanctions](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.economist.com%2Fbusiness%2F2018%2F06%2F23%2Fglencore-dodges-american-sanctions-rather-than-spurn-its-friends&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=7) for economic and human rights violations because it can [exploit the local workforce](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theguardian.com%2Fbusiness%2F2012%2Fapr%2F14%2Fglencore-child-labour-acid-dumping-row&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=8) for cheap labor. This comes in the wake of Tina Smith's shameful actions in Washington--attaching her Smith Amendment to the unrelated National Defense Spending Bill--which opened the doors for Glencore to begin its sulfide mines in Minnesota. Tina Smith wants you to believe that our cherished wetlands and forests are in good hands, but **this is a lie so bold** it could've come from the President himself. We need a strong voice in Washington who will stand up to special interests and prevent these international gangsters and crooks from pillaging our country. Contribute today to help Richard be that voice. [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=glencore_subpoena_fundraiser&n=9) Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota

subject: Celebrate Independence Day by Fighting for Liberty!
body:
Your help is urgently needed to keep Nancy Pelosi out of the Speaker's Chair!!! -- | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/stevesmithaz.com/july3volunteer2?e=1fa29a1af8)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Fellow Patriot,

Happy Independence Day!
As we prepare to celebrate this important day in our nation's history, we must also prepare to exercise our sacred duty to defend the Republic our founding fathers created for us. _**We Urgently Need Your Help! Join us this weekend in Oro Valley and Casa Grande, or help out in your own neighborhood. Get details below!**_ What the media calls a “Blue Wave” is in reality a Red Current sweeping through the Democratic party and trying to wash away the rights and liberty our nation was founded upon. So-called “Democratic Socialists” are on the rise in the Democratic Party, and Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and the Democrat “leaders” are embracing these radical leftists and their destructive agenda as their only hope for regaining power in Washington. **It's up to YOU and ME to Stop Them!** We MUST send strong, unwavering, Constitutional Conservatives to Washington to fight for our Republic and our way of life. **The battle for the heart and soul of our nation starts Right Here in our own backyard.** Arizona's First Congressional District has been identified as the most likely seat in the nation to flip from Democrat to Republican, but that's only going to happen if we have the strongest candidate possible to challenge the incumbent Democrat Tom O'Halleran. **Steve Smith is the only Republican candidate in the CD1 race with a proven record of diligently defending conservative values, and a proven record of defeating entrenched Democrats.** I know you understand all of this, that's why you're receiving this email, but do your friends and neighbors know what's at stake? We urgently need your help getting this message out to fellow Republicans in your neighborhood and across this huge district! **There are less than 4 weeks left before early ballots go out and we need your help to reach those Republican voters.** _**Here's How You Can Help!**_ We need you to walk the few blocks around Your Home to pass out information about Steve Smith, to inform your neighbors and let us know who wants a yard sign. We can send you a map and a list of Republican voters right in your area, who need to know about Steve and this important race. **We can stop the radical left, but only with your help.** If you can’t walk your neighborhood, or you want to do more, you can help by making phone calls from home or at one of our phone banks. We have an easy to use “phone from home” system that will provide you with phone numbers and information on exactly what to say. It also provides the recipient with our phone number, not yours, so you won't have people calling you back on your number. We are calling every day. If you can give us just an hour from your home, it is a tremendous way that you can help Steve win. **The time is now! Let’s Get Out The Vote for Steve Smith so we can flip this district from Democrat to Republican!** _Just reply to this email or call**Linda at 516-784-9417**_ We are also walking in groups in different locations throughout the district. This weekend we are focusing on**Oro Valley** and **Casa Grande**. This **Saturday, July 7****th** , we are walking as a group in **Oro Valley**. We would love to have you join us. We'll be meeting at**9:00AM** at: **The home of Jane Stump Green**
**2305 E Skipping Rock Way**
**Oro Valley, AZ 85737** **For further information and directions to Oro Valley, please RSVP Jane Stump Green at 520-288-6840**
If you live closer to **Casa Grande** , teams will be walking on **Saturday** from **1:00 – 4:00PM** in **Casa Grande** and on **Sunday** from **9am – 1:00PM.** Meet at: **Pinal County Conservative Office at Arizona Plaza
408 N Sacaton St, Suite H
Casa Grande, AZ 85122** **Swing by our office to get a walk list or help us phone bank there!**

_For more information please call**Linda at 516-784-9417 or reply to this email.**_

**Help us send Mr. Smith to Washington!**

You can learn more about Steve and his record by visiting [_SteveSmithAZ.com_](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=390285f9c2&e=1fa29a1af8).

**Thank you for your support, and God Bless.**

Jordan Kittleson
Campaign Manager
Steve Smith for Congress

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: What we know about the president's potential nominees:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Team -- I must thank you for your incredible support.

On Saturday, I faced my most important FEC deadline this year. I'm happy to share we hit our goal, and we saw an amazing outpouring of grassroots support.

**But with the news of Justice Kennedy 's retirement from the Supreme Court, there isn't any time to celebrate.**

President Trump's next Supreme Court pick could drastically reshape our highest court and make it more conservative for decades to come. That means all of the major gains we've made toward a fairer, freer, and more just society could be overturned in just a year or two, fundamentally altering the fabric of our country.

Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ is at the top of conservatives' wish list, but there is far more on the chopping block. A Trump nominee will likely vote to weaken workers' rights (even more so than last week's _Janus_ ruling), overturn marriage equality and other LGBTQ protections, and undo the Affordable Care Act.

**We can pass laws to protect these rights and programs, but we need more Democrats in Congress to do it.** That is one of the many reasons I am running for another term in the Senate, and it's why your grassroots support is so critical this year for Democratic campaigns, including my own.

Thank you again for your support,

Martin

subject: GPS? I prefer Joe-PS

body:
Joe is our best GPS. We call it Joe-PS. Whether it's avoiding traffic through back country roads (that the RV barely fits through!) or finding the fastest route to a parade line-up, we can always rely |

Peter,

I do a lot of driving around in the RV in my job on the campaign, but when Joe's on board, he's the captain of the ship.

And when it comes to navigating Indiana, **Joe is our best GPS. We call it Joe-PS**. Whether it's avoiding traffic through back country roads (that the RV barely fits on!) or finding the fastest route to a parade line-up, we can always rely on his sense of direction.

We've been getting some good mileage out of the Joe-PS today -- we're on the road talking to Hoosier seniors at four different stops about what they believe is the best path forward for Indiana. From protecting health care for working families to standing up for our veterans, Joe will fight every day for working and middle-class Hoosiers.

And just like he does when he's driving the RV, **Joe forges his own path in the Senate**. He's not afraid to stand up to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump -- which is why so many **extreme Republican super PACs are spending millions in Indiana to spread outright lies about Joe and his record.**

Our campaign is powered by grassroots support, and talking to voters face-to-face is our top priority. We need your help to make sure we can get to every corner of the state. **Will you chip in to help us keep Joe-PS going for another six years?**
